recentTweets.text:
Our children are God’s greatest gift, & America’s future.

TRUMP Accounts give them the jumpstart they need to achieve their American Dream & carry the torch for the next generation.

https://t.co/0kBvkFqEkU

Nearly 190,000 Americans can now use Pell Grants for trade school, thanks to the Working Families Tax Cuts.

No debt, just opportunity. THIS is how we build the American Dream.🔨

America cannot rely on China for the elements that power our everyday lives.

In yesterday's @HouseForeignAffairs hearing, I highlighted my DOMINANCE Act & the urgent need to strengthen DFC's tools to secure America’s critical minerals supply chains. ⛓️

https://t.co/v8vQQCfikh

Energy security is national security. I’m leading the fight to strengthen America’s critical minerals supply chains & secure America’s energy future for good.

https://t.co/Twkdcm5d0q

America’s economic competitiveness depends on strong commercial diplomacy that actually supports U.S. businesses overseas.

If we’re serious about winning on the world stage, we need a coordinated, expert-driven commercial diplomacy strategy—not more bureaucracy. Read more 👇

Senior citizens shouldn’t have to face extra Medicare surcharges just because they live in high-cost Southern California.

@CongressmanKean & I introduced the Medicare Premiums Reduction Act of 2026 to cut these unfair costs & give our seniors the breathing room they deserve on

Too many have forgotten the difference between communism & freedom.

Let me show you.

North Korea vs. South Korea at night. https://t.co/CTaBjccCo2
Career politicians have perfected the art of self-preservation, & Americans are paying for it. PASS TERM LIMITS NOW!

Our veterans answered the call to serve our nation. They deserve a clear path to accessing the benefits they've earned.

Proud my VALID Act is now law, ensuring veterans receive transparent information about their VA home loan options.

I'll always fight to honor our commitment https://t.co/1wDc1hd0xA

American businesses compete every day against aggressive adversaries abroad. We cannot afford to fall behind.

As Chair of the East Asia & Pacific Subcommittee, I'm fighting to strengthen U.S. commercial diplomacy & put our workers & businesses FIRST on the world stage. https://t.co/Jr7Ig0CH8p

As a mom & grandma, I know there's nothing more important than the health of a mother & her child.

On #BumpDay, we recognize the importance of supporting women throughout pregnancy & giving every child a healthy start.

I'll keep fighting for healthier moms, babies, & families.

Today @FinancialCmte hosted Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh to discuss everyday consumer costs & housing affordability.

🎥Watch my remarks below.
https://t.co/Kap34lQqN8

Closing export control loopholes is critical to WINNING the AI arms race with China.

I raised my concerns with BIS's Under Secretary Kessler on this at @HouseForeign today.

📄 Read more BELOW:
https://t.co/W2PGzOgKgq

America’s security & prosperity come FIRST.

China SHOULD NOT have access to our most sensitive technology, but loopholes are allowing Chinese shell companies get them anyway.

I am fighting to close these vulnerabilities & ensure America’s technological edge & national security

NO TAX ON TIPS delivers relief for our service economy:

🚕Taxi & ride-share drivers

💇Hair stylists

🍽️ Restaurant workers

...are just a few of the 8M Americans who have already claimed the deduction, with an average tax break of more than $7,000.

Your tips. Your money.

🇺🇸 BIG WIN for our veterans!

The VA disability claims backlog is at its lowest level since 2020 — a more than 74% drop since January.

That means more veterans are getting the benefits they’ve earned, and they’re getting them faster. Let’s keep delivering for those who served.

My Community Investment & Prosperity Act unlocks more private capital for middle-class housing & community development.💰🏘️

It's another step toward building more homes, cutting barriers to investment, & making the American Dream more attainable again.🧵2/3

My VALID Act ensures veterans see their VA loan options right alongside conventional & FHA loans.🇺🇸

Our heroes fought for the American Dream. They deserve every tool to achieve it here at home. 🧵3/3

The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act is NOW LAW.

Washington kicked the can down the road on housing for nearly 30 years, & homeownership has become unattainable.

Today, we're changing that.🔑

I'm proud to have secured TWO key provisions in this historic bill. 🧵1/3

Even with ZERO additional contributions, TRUMP Accounts teach kids the magic of compound interest, growing to $5,800 by age 18 & $18,100 by age 28.

I introduced the SEEDS Act to make this $1K seed investment in our kids PERMANENT & jumpstart the American Dream. https://t.co/pNgRxXYQTk

“In all things I have shown you that by working hard in this way we must help the weak and remember the words of the Lord Jesus, how he himself said, ‘It is more blessed to give than to receive.’”- Acts 20:35

One year later & the Working Families Tax Cuts are still delivering real relief, rewarding hard work, & helping families keep more of what they earn.

I’m proud to keep fighting for policies that make the American Dream more affordable & within reach.

250 years after the Declaration of Independence was adopted, it was an honor to read its timeless words with our community at @NixonLibrary.

"The American Dream does not come to those who fall asleep." — President Nixon

Let us be bold & uphold the many freedoms of America!🇺🇸 https://t.co/VKLGXSTWw2
Fraud is theft of the American people, plain & simple. Zero tolerance.

🛠️Pell Grants are now open for trade schools & short-term workforce programs through the Working Families Tax Cuts.

This means more young Americans can train for high-demand jobs, build lifelong careers, & avoid the crushing weight of student debt.
America is the greatest country on God’s green earth.

When you are granted U.S. citizenship, you don’t just come to America — you become American.

You can search every corner of the world, but you can only find this HERE.❤️🤍💙 https://t.co/pu5KRFp3Zn

86% of ALL Americans want Congress banned from stock trading.

This isn’t a partisan issue; it’s an American issue.

Small businesses are the heartbeat of our communities here in CA.

I fought to preserve the 20% small business deduction in the Working Families Tax Cuts so job creators can grow, hire, & reinvest in their workers.

I will always fight to keep Main Street open for business.

The CCP is waging a silent war on America.

Each day, Chinese companies are producing & exporting deadly fentanyl precursors in broad daylight.

Washington can't keep turning a blind eye. I'm fighting to hold the CCP accountable & shut down Beijing's poison pipeline. https://t.co/5S1YC891yC

Investing in our children is investing in America's future.

My SEEDS Act makes TRUMP Accounts PERMANENT so our kids & grandkids can learn the value of saving & investing early.

Let's give every child the gift of financial freedom & a head start on the American Dream.🇺🇸

My family fled war-torn Korea searching for opportunity & hope — America has given us that & so much more.

There is nothing sweeter than freedom. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/b9ibZLR3sa

FYI: In CA, 1 in 3 community college applicants have been flagged as likely FAKE.

Just the tip of the iceberg. I’m fighting in Congress to get to the bottom of it & put an end to this outrageous abuse.

The Working Families Tax Cuts lift up every generation.

👵35M seniors claimed an average $7,500 deduction through No Tax on Social Security.

👶6M children enrolled in TRUMP Accounts, with 500,000 already receiving their first $1,000 investment.

Promises made. Promises kept.🇺🇸

America’s history isn’t just about Presidents & Founding Fathers. It’s about our legacy as inventors, dreamers, & builders.

CA is lucky enough to have TWO presidential libraries, & @NixonLibrary's “A More Perfect Union” exhibit brings America 250 to life in Yorba Linda.🇺🇸 https://t.co/JV6uvNEFOj
112 hospice agencies operating out of one address isn't a punchline. It's a red flag for Medicare fraud, & it's happening in California. https://t.co/MTlQwe35gJ

There is far too much red tape coming out of Washington.

That’s why I introduced the REG Act to rein in SEC overregulation & ensure new rules don’t make it harder for small businesses, innovators, & families to succeed.

Team Young was honored to attend Chino Hills annual Independence Day Celebration.

With nearly 4,000 people in attendance, the evening was filled with community spirit & family fun!🎊 https://t.co/hZWy3raIcG

Proud to join Laguna Hills for the unveiling of its Freedom Wall!

This stunning mosaic celebrates America's 250th birthday while showcasing our community's patriotism & pride. https://t.co/gI5MTSdgvF
It’s game day! Let’s go U.S.A. 🇺🇸⚽️

People aren't leaving California on a whim.

High taxes & skyrocketing costs are pushing families out & making our state unlivable.

I’m fighting for a CA where families can thrive, not flee. https://t.co/pmawvTZr9G

💳26 million Americans are considered "credit invisible."

My Credit Access & Inclusion Act will give Americans the credit they deserve by recognizing on-time rent, utility, internet, & phone payments.

You pay your bills on time. Our credit system should recognize that.

Nothing captures the spirit of Independence Day quite like Yorba Linda's 4th of July Spectacular 🎉! 

Proud to honor our nation's past while looking forward to what is still to come! https://t.co/jejnE3oDo6

Great joining the Mission Viejo 4th of July Street Fair yesterday! Events like these remind me of the dream that brought my family here decades ago from South Korea.🇺🇸 
 
America's promise is real, & it's worth celebrating every single day. https://t.co/958xdLEJYd

Proud to celebrate the red, white, & blue in Tustin! 

THIS is the American Dream, & I 'll spend each day in Congress working to keep it alive for our kids & grandkids. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/NonDMRK0NP
The American Dream: “Go America 250!” https://t.co/8FExJtRQvy
Psalm 118:24: "This is the day that the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad in it."
The American Dream: “Freedom comes with responsibility.” https://t.co/IKJgTdsPGX

It was great to start America’s 250th birthday at the Orange Park Acres America 250 5K this morning! 
 
We are so fortunate to enjoy these simple freedoms together. 🏃‍♀️🇺🇸 https://t.co/Fs4iQrfyfo
The American Dream: “Only in America, you can BECOME an American.” https://t.co/czei9wrPdt
The American Dream: “Life is getting better.” https://t.co/vbh7cTq5lP

A new mother should never have to worry about picking between family & work.

The Working Families Tax Cuts make the Paid Family and Medical Leave Tax Credit permanent, helping companies support employees with wages, insurance, & extra leave during life’s most important times.
The day I became an American was the best day of my life. https://t.co/9vvR7AenfT
The American Dream: “We are living it.” https://t.co/44aGwtWlW6

Deeply concerned by the @JudiciaryGOP's report revealing ROK’s discriminatory actions against U.S. companies like Coupang. Unfair enforcement & burdensome regulations harm American innovation & jobs. 

Our alliance is vital—we must address these issues to ensure the U.S.-ROK

The American Dream is built on financial stability.

That's why I fought for:
🇺🇸No Tax on Tips
🇺🇸No Tax on Social Security
🇺🇸$2,200 Child Tax Credit
🇺🇸Increased SALT deduction up to $40,000

So hardworking Americans in every phase of life can afford to pursue their dream. https://t.co/IitxGffe9Y

California tops the list with the highest state income tax rate in the country at 13.3%.

Hardworking Californians are taxed enough. Sacramento’s costly policies are driving families & jobs out of our state.

We need relief, not more punishment. https://t.co/fMG0zhkbiX

Today, I introduced the Healthy Mothers, Healthy Babies Act.

As a mom & grandma, I know nothing matters more than the health of our kids. This bill supports families with proven, American-made solutions, strengthens U.S. jobs, protects taxpayers, & keeps America leading on the

CA’s high costs & ever-increasing taxes have hit local businesses hard. I’m fighting back.

From No Tax on Tips to increasing SALT deduction up to $40K, I’ve been fighting to give Californians real relief & make their lives a little easier.

This is what makes America great! https://t.co/1GWcLKCf3f

My bipartisan HEATS Act unleashes America’s energy potential by:
🔥 Cutting red tape
🔥 Boosting reliable, American-made clean energy
🔥 Lowering costs for families
This is how we power our future—all of the above, made in America.

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 3 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Young Kim. The social-media posture reads as kurdistan-adjacent regional signal because the strongest matched frame is Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 1 security-frame hit, 0 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 3 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-07-16T21:00:00Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
assessment.dominantFrame: Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language

Check fraud can happen to anyone at any time.

My STOP Payments Fraud Act protects Americans by giving banks extra time to review suspicious checks & wire transfers before funds are released to fraudsters.

Just passed @FinancialCmte, read more!⬇️
https://t.co/plxWizw53M

The House just passed my bill to rename the Tustin Post Office in honor of Ursula Ellen Kennedy, Tustin's first female mayor.

My STOP Fraud Act gives banks time to stop
